set.body: Cold and warm variants already sit adjacent in raw-results.csv but the delta (warm_ms - cold_ms, cold/warm ratio) is never stored. Derive in benchmark-regression.R and emit as delta_cold_warm_ms and cold_warm_ratio. Primary design metric for whether residency is paying off. Depends on P1 amatrix-42q (warmup bug) because today's cold/warm values are unreliable.
set.title: Add cold/warm delta column to raw-results.csv
